response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of strong IC engineering experience and genuine developer tooling credentials (test runner, TDD libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP frameworks), but the role is explicitly a full-time people leadership position requiring 2+ years of managing direct reports and 3+ years of organizational leadership. The resume contains zero evidence of managing engineers, conducting performance reviews, or leading organizational change — the core function of this Level II Manager role. His 'Staff' titles reflect technical seniority, not managerial responsibility, making him a poor fit for what is fundamentally a people management position despite his technical depth.
strengths: Genuine developer tooling background: built open-source test runner (Trial), TDD assertion library (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD infrastructure at Altom, and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Broad technical depth across 15+ years spanning mobile (iOS/Apple TV), embedded systems, low-latency services, and full-stack — aligns with the mobile platform context
Teaching and knowledge-sharing track record (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, conference talks) shows ability to elevate team technical skills
concerns: No evidence whatsoever of managing direct reports, conducting 1-on-1s, setting performance expectations, or owning headcount — the role's primary requirement
No demonstrated experience driving organizational change, setting team-level roadmaps, or operating at a cross-team strategic level
Developer tooling work is scattered across side projects and partial job duties rather than a sustained 3-year primary focus in a professional context

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure background
No organizational leadership or team strategy ownership
